gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Gauss the 3rd approved with no findings after checking target schema/parsing, single-target payload generation, matrix target propagation, benchmark-plan target JSON output, legacy wrapper compatibility, tests, and docs.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 186 passed
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> clean
poetry run python manual smoke confirmed vLLM and SGLang delegate paths map to DOCUMENT_KV_*_NATIVE_PROBE_FACTORY and are not runner parameters
GPT-5.5 reviewer Gauss the 3rd approved with no findings
what_changed: Added native_probe_delegate_factory support to Databricks engine-probe target/job config so built-in reserved probes can receive backend-native delegates through cluster spark_env_vars.
Carried benchmark-plan --engine-probe-native-delegate-factory values into generated engine-probe target JSON while preserving plan-record compatibility by omitting the optional field when unset.
Covered single-target, matrix-target, JSON parsing, CLI rejection, benchmark-plan target emission, docs, and legacy compatibility behavior.
why: Managed AWS g5 Databricks engine-probe jobs need to run stable built-in vLLM/SGLang probe factory paths while injecting downstream native adapter factories through environment variables, avoiding manual run payload edits.
